Metadata.title: Ship For Good BCN — 1st Edition
Metadata.description: Devs, Product Managers and Designers working together to create real solutions for teams with impact. 29–30 May 2026 at 42 Barcelona.

Hero.headline: It's not another hackathon. It's the first one built for those who truly need it.
Hero.subheadline: Devs, Product Managers and Designers working together to create real solutions for teams with impact. No prizes. No hype. Only impact.
Hero.cta: I want to build something that gets used (Coming very soon)

Schedule.title: Two days, one mission
Schedule.day1_description: Civio presents the real challenges to work on. Teams are formed (you can come with yours or join one). First solutions sketched. Networking and drinks.
Schedule.day2_description: Full-day work session: dev, design and product running in parallel. Profile-specific talks throughout the day. Continuous mentoring to unblock and advance. Final showcase of the most ambitious AI-powered solutions built during the event.

CivioSection.title: Partner: Fundación Civio
CivioSection.description: <civio>Fundación Civio</civio> is an independent foundation that monitors public power, fights institutional opacity, and uses journalism, technology, and open data to give citizens access to information.
CivioSection.quote: The challenges we will work on are theirs. The impact, everyone's.

HowItWorks.title: What do you get?
HowItWorks.benefit_1: Product + AI + people — real metrics, AI-assisted product development.
HowItWorks.benefit_2: Profile-specific talks for devs, PMs and designers.
HowItWorks.benefit_5: Community of people who want to build things that matter.
HowItWorks.who_description: For developers, product managers and designers. Your experience level doesn't matter — your attitude does. think · build · help

faq1.question: Do I need to come with a team?
faq1.answer: No. You can form one on Friday.

faq2.question: Are there prizes?
faq2.answer: No. The prize is that what you build actually gets used.

faq3.question: Do I need prior hackathon experience?

faq4.question: What happens to what we build?
faq4.answer: The goal is that solutions have life beyond the event.

faq6.question: Do I need to attend both days?

Footer.closing: What you build here can change something for real.
Footer.register_cta: Coming soon, you'll be able to register →
